content.en:
Time flies.

The long years passed.

Ye Tian searched little by little in the ruins of the True Dragon Realm and found a lot of True Dragon Blood Golden Stones.

However, due to the fact that the True Dragon Blood Golden Stone was difficult to sense, his efficiency was not high.

this day.

When Ye Tian was looking for the True Dragon Blood Golden Stone, he encountered a little trouble.

Rumble!!!!

True dragons appeared all around, and the aura of each true dragon was comparable to that of an incomparably powerful Heavenly Ancestor.

"Damn the Outer Heavenly Ancestor, kill him!"

These true dragons came one after another.

"It seems that it was the True Dragon that he killed before, which caused the anger of the True Dragon Clan, and he is still chasing and killing the Heavenly Ancestor of the outside world!"

Ye Tian was not worried, with his current strength, he was naturally not afraid of these true dragons.

Airplanes!

Ye Tian turned into a ten-armed golden body state, and his ten arms became infinite, instantly grabbing these true dragons.

Click!!

He just pinched it lightly, and these real dragons were hit hard.

In an instant, he threw it, and these true dragons smashed the peaks of the True Dragon Realm Ruins, and a large amount of true dragon blood flowed on the earth.

After an infinite period of time, it is estimated that some true dragon blood gold stones will be bred here.

", bother me again, kill you!"

Ye Tian said coldly.

These true dragons suddenly ran away without a shadow and disappeared completely.

Originally, he wanted to kill these true dragons, but at the moment when he made his move, the breath of the true dragons of the Blood Transformation Realm was transmitted from the depths of the True Dragon Realm Ruins.

So, he just taught a lesson, and released these real dragons.

"It's strange, there is a true dragon of the Blood Transformation Realm in the ruins of the True Dragon Realm, why didn't he save the true dragon that was besieged and killed before?" Ye Tian was puzzled.

Could it be that there are any limitations, or is it something else?

"Dongao Heavenly Ancestor should know!"

Ye Tian said darkly.

......

Hayabusa Dragon City.

Another copy of Ye Tian's body came here to visit Dongao Heavenly Ancestor.

Soon, he met Dongao Tianzu.

"I've seen Dongao Heavenly Ancestor!"

"I've seen the Endless Heavenly Ancestor!"

Ye Tian and Dongao Tianzu greeted each other politely.

"Endless Heavenly Ancestor, is there anything wrong with coming to visit me?" asked Dongao Heavenly Ancestor.

Ye Tian didn't beat around the bush, and directly expressed his doubts, "Dongao Heavenly Ancestor, I sensed the true dragon of the Blood Transformation Realm in the True Dragon Realm Ruins, what is going on? If the True Dragon Realm Ruins has a true dragon in the Blood Transformation Realm, why do you still sit back and watch the true dragon under your command being surrounded and killed by other Heavenly Ancestors?"

Dongao Heavenly Ancestor smiled and said, "Endless Heavenly Ancestor, you should have been fighting with the True Dragon Clan, and that True Dragon of the Blood Transformation Realm showed its breath, right?"

"Yes!"

Ye Tian nodded.

Dongao Heavenly Ancestor explained: "The True Dragon Clan of the True Dragon Realm Ruins does have the True Dragon of the Blood Transformation Realm, and I can find an opportunity to break through in the True Dragon Realm Ruins and achieve the Blood Transformation Realm Heavenly Ancestor, and the True Dragon Clan is a hegemon-level race in the True Dragon Realm Ruins, and after a long time, the True Dragon Clan can have the Blood Transformation Realm Heavenly Ancestor even if it is a waste material." "

"That's right!"

Ye Tian nodded.

Dongao Heavenly Ancestor continued: "I don't know how many True Dragons of the True Dragon Clan have in the Blood Transformation Realm. It was also after I became the Heavenly Ancestor of the Blood Transformation Realm that I was found by a Blood Transformation Realm True Dragon, so I chose to leave the True Dragon Realm Ruins. "

"True Dragon Realm Ruins, don't allow the Blood Transformation Realm Heavenly Ancestor to enter?"

Ye Tian asked.

"Hmm!" Dongao Heavenly Ancestor nodded, "Otherwise, in such a treasure place as the True Dragon Realm Ruins, why doesn't there be a Blood Transformation Realm Heavenly Ancestor?" It's because there is an agreement with the True Dragon Clan that we are not allowed to enter, but other Heavenly Ancestors of the Fusion Realm can enter. The Ten Thousand Dragons Territorial Sea has signed an agreement with the True Dragon Clan of the True Dragon Realm Ruins, and we, the Blood Transformation Realm Heavenly Ancestors, are not allowed to enter, but the Blood Transformation Realm Heavenly Ancestors of the True Dragon Clan cannot attack and kill the Heavenly Ancestors of the Ten Thousand Dragons Territorial Sea. Therefore, even if a true dragon was besieged and killed, they could only send other true dragons to support as soon as possible, and the Blood Transformation Realm could not interfere. "

"I see!"

Ye Tian completely understood.

"Endless Heavenly Ancestor, you estimate that there are a lot of true dragons to deal with at one time, that Blood Transformation Realm True Dragon is a little reluctant, plus your combat power is already enough to match the Blood Transformation Realm Heavenly Ancestor, only to deal with it will expose your breath, I hope you stop!"

"That's true!" Ye Tiandao.

"Endless Heavenly Ancestor, although you have not yet become a Blood Transformation Realm Heavenly Ancestor, the Blood Transformation Realm of the True Dragon Clan will definitely focus on you, and it is best for you not to kill the members of the True Dragon Clan, so as not to cause a bad situation. Dongao Tianzu suggested.

"I understand!"

Ye Tian nodded.

......

Knowing the situation of the True Dragon Clan, Ye Tian would not go to trouble the True Dragon Clan.

And the True Dragon clan didn't dare to trouble him anymore, even if a True Dragon happened to bump into him, they would turn around and leave.

And just like that, another long time passed.

At this time, Ye Tian had already found enough True Dragon Blood Golden Stones.

Subsequently, he fused all these True Dragon Blood Gold Stones into the True Dragon Blood Marrow Stone, and extracted the True Dragon Blood Marrow Liquid from the True Dragon Blood Marrow Stone.

"Next, I will retreat, and strive to integrate all the immeasurable supernatural powers into my whole body, and become a Heavenly Ancestor at the peak of the Fusion Realm!" Ye Tian muttered.

Drop after drop of true dragon blood marrow fluid was consumed, and Ye Tian's immeasurable magic technique was also integrated into his whole body.

It's just that these immeasurable magic techniques are fused with the whole body, and the strength of the increase is almost negligible, and only when the number is sufficient can some strength be improved.

Time flies, long years have passed, and the immeasurable magic skills of Ye Tian's whole body have almost completely integrated into his whole body, and he is almost at the peak of the fusion realm.

"The last immeasurable magic technique!"

Ye Tian swallowed a drop of True Dragon Blood Marrow Fluid and began to try to integrate this last immeasurable magic technique into his whole body from the immeasurable bone.

It all went smoothly and without any problems.

Airplanes!!!!

A strange light burst out from inside Ye Tian's body, and his flesh and blood were filled with this light.

"Immeasurable Divine Light!"

Seeing this light, he knew that he had reached the pinnacle of the Fusion Realm, and his flesh and blood body had already reached a state of perfection.

If he wants to continue to progress, he can only use the immeasurable light of supernatural powers to promote the transformation of his heart, complete the blood transformation, and become the Heavenly Ancestor of the Blood Transformation Realm.

But in a short period of time, it was still very difficult for him to become a Blood Transformation Realm Heavenly Ancestor, and he had to take chance.

He also chatted with Dongao Heavenly Ancestor about how to impact the Blood Transformation Realm, and Dongao Heavenly Ancestor was already at the level of almost reaching the Blood Transformation Realm, and he was lucky enough to find a special place in the True Dragon Realm Ruins and obtain a rare treasure, which only then did he impact the Blood Transformation Realm.

But such an opportunity is only once, and it is unlikely that it will be obtained again.

After all, the treasures that could help the Heavenly Ancestor impact the Blood Transformation Realm, if it were easy to find, would have been taken away by the True Dragon Clan a long time ago, how could it be left to the Heavenly Ancestor in the outside world!
